name: Ability Glasses
description:
Glasses used to discern hidden Pal abilities.
Displays Health, Attack and Defense stats on a scale of 0 to 100.

name: Accumulator
description: A facility for storing excess electricity generated by the Power Generator.

name: Advanced Chest
description:
Stores items.
Quite sturdy, with plenty of storage space.
It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

name: Advanced Medicine Workbench
description:
A facility for making Pal medicine.
It requires electricity, but can produce high quality medicine.
Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

name: Advanced Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Extremely high quality, it rapidly restores HP before your eyes.

name: Alarm Bell
description:
Bell that sets the alert status for Pals on base.
Chasnge Pal behavior to either attack invading enemies or focus entirely on work whenever you like.

name: Alluring Bait
description:
Bait that lures in Pals.
Improved to enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame and increase the number of items obtained from fishing.

name: Alpha Wave Generator
description:
A device that generates alpha waves to relax Pals.
It slows the rate at which the SAN value of allies at the base decreases.
Placing more than two will not have any additional effect.

name: Amusement Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Your Pals will keep on working.

name: Ancient Civilization Core
description:
Core from technology that was lost long ago.
Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

name: Ancient Civilization Parts
description:
Debris excavatated from ancient ruins.
Contains abundant information on lost technology.
Extremely valuable, people from all walks of life are now seeking such crystals.

name: Ancient Technical Manual
description:
A book that contains long-lost secrets of technology from a forgotten era.
Use it to obtain Ancient Technology Points.

name: Antique Bath Set
description:
Decorative furniture set. 
 Can't actually be used to stay clean.

name: Antique Chair Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Use with an antique desk.

name: Antique Couch Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Gives the air of luxury to your base.

name: Antique Curtain
description:
Decorative antique curtain.
Can be placed on walls.

name: Antique Desk
description: Decorative antique desk.

name: Antique Desk Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Use with an antique chair.

name: Antique Dresser
description:
Dresser useful for giving yourself a remake.
Allows players to edit their appearence.

name: Antique Globe
description: Decorative antique globe.

name: Antique High Quality Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Gives an air of stately elegance to your base.

name: Antique Lamp Set
description:
Antique lamp set to provide illumination.
Requires electricity.

name: Antique Mirror Set
description: Decorative furniture set. Essential for making sure you look good.

name: Antique Round Table
description: Decorative antique round table.

name: Antique Storage Cabinet Set
description:
Antique storage cabinet set.
Can store items.

name: Antique Storage Set
description:
Antique storage furniture set.
Can store items.

name: Antique Stove
description: Decorative antique stove.

name: Antique Wardrobe
description: Antique wardrobe for storing items.

name: Arrow
description:
Used with Old Bow.
Requires Primitive Workbench to craft.

name: Arsox Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Arsox.

name: Assault Rifle Ammo
description:
Ammo for Assault Rifle and other similar weapons.
Requires Weapon Assembly Line to craft.

name: Assault Rifle Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Assault Rifle (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Assault Rifle Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Assault Rifle (Rare).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Assault Rifle Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Assault Rifle (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Assault Rifle Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Assault Rifle (Legendary).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Astegon Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Astegon.

name: Attack Pendant
description: An accessory that slightly raises Attack.

name: Attack Pendant +1
description: An accessory that raises Attack.

name: Attack Pendant +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Attack.

name: Average Feed Bag
description:
A decently sized pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 2 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

name: Azurobe Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Azurobe.

name: Baked Berries
description: Cooking enhances their nutritional value, and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

name: Baked Mushroom
description:
Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value.
Curiously, it's also quite filling.

name: Barricade Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place to keep somewhere off limits.

name: Bathroom Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Can't be used for its original purpose.

name: Beakon Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Beakon.

name: Bear Trap (Large)
description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on large Pals.

name: Bear Trap (Small)
description:
Immobilizes those who step on it.
Only effective on small Pals or humans.

name: Beautiful Flower
description:
A plant that blooms colorful flowers.
Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice.

name: Bellanoir Libero (Ultra) Slab
description:
Slab overflowing with Bellanoir Libero's energy.
Offer to an Summoning Altar to summon an inconceivably powerful (Lv 50) Bellanoir Libero.

name: Bellanoir Libero (Ultra) Slab Fragment
description: Fragment overflowing with Bellanoir Libero's energy. Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Bellanoir Libero's Slab
description:
Slab depicting Bellanoir Libero.
Offer to a Summoning Altar to summon an exceptionally powerful Lv 50 Bellanoir Libero.

name: Bellanoir Libero's Slab Fragment
description:
Fragment depicting Bellanoir Libero.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Bellanoir's Slab
description:
Slab depicting Bellanoir.
Offer to an Summoning Altar to summon a powerful Lv 30 Bellanoir.

name: Bellanoir's Slab Fragment
description:
Fragment depicting Bellanoir.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Berry Plantation
description:
A farm that can grow Red Berries.
Harvest time is quick, but eating them doesn't provide much sustenance.

name: Berry Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Red Berries.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be obtained when picking Red Berries.

name: Beta Wave Generator
description:
A device that emits beta waves to energize Pals.
It increases the work speed of Pals at the base.
Placing more than one will not have any additional effect.

name: Big Wall Ivy
description:
Decorative large ivy.
Can be placed on a wall.

name: Blazamut Ryu (Ultra) Slab
description:
Slab overflowing with energy of Blazamut Ryu.
Offer to an Summoning Altar to summon an inconceivably powerful (Lv 55) Blazamut Ryu.

name: Blazamut Ryu Slab
description:
Slab depicting Blazamut Ryu.
Offer to an Summoning Altar to summon a very powerful Lv 55 Blazamut Ryu.

name: Blazamut Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Blazamut.

name: Blazehowl Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Blazehowl.

name: Boltmane Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Boltmane.

name: Bone
description:
Bone collected from Pals.
A valuable source of premium calcium.

name: Bowler Hat
description:
A tough, round hat.
It was sold with the guarantee that it wouldn't break
even if a Mammorest stepped on it.

name: Bowler Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Bowler Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Bread
description:
Bread made from baked Flour.
A tasty staple food.

name: Broiled Dumud
description:
Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce.
Soothes both mind and body.
Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

name: Broncherry Meat
description:
Broncherry meat.
Giant meat full of massive stores of energy.
Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

name: Broncherry Rib Roast
description:
Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds.
Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone,
making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

name: Broncherry Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Broncherry.

name: Burden Elixir
description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises carrying capacity when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Burden Remedy
description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises carrying capacity by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Cable Reel
description: Decorative cable reel.

name: Cake
description:
A dish that is eaten during celebrations.
Put it in the chest at your breeding farm to have a Pal lay a particularly healthy egg.

name: Campfire
description:
Used to make simple food
or provide meager warmth and light.

name: Caprity Meat
description:
Caprity meat.
Healthy and full of nutrients.
Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

name: Carbon Fiber
description:
A lightweight yet sturdy material.
Used to create armor among other equipment.

name: Carbonara
description:
A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk.
Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.

name: Carpet Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place on a foundation in your base for that homey feel.

name: Carrot
description:
A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable.
Not suited for raw consumption.

name: Carrot Seeds
description: Seeds that produce Carrots.

name: Carrying Lotus (L)
description:
Large purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Burden Elixir.

name: Carrying Lotus (S)
description:
Small purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Burden Remedy.

name: Cavern Mushroom
description:
Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves.
Can be made into healing medicine.

name: Ceiling Lamp
description: Lights up dark areas below at a base.

name: Celaray's Gloves
description: Gloves for gently holding on to Celaray's fins. If Celaray is in your team, it can be used as a glider.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Cement
description:
Cement used for creating structures and more.
Can be produced in a High Quality Workbench.

name: Charcoal
description:
Charcoal made from burning wood.
It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder.

name: Chikipi Poultry
description:
Chikipi meat.
Light and easy to eat,
it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

name: Chikipi Sauté
description:
Plump poultry sautéed in butter.
Accented with fresh lemons.
Eat to slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

name: Chillet Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Chillet.

name: Chromite
description:
A type of metal buried underground.
It can be detected with a Metal Detector on certain islands.

name: Circuit Board
description:
Required to create precision equipment.
Can be made with a Production Assembly Line.

name: Claw Crane
description:
Decorative claw crane.
Broken, it can't be played.

name: Clock Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Doesn't actually tell time.

name: Cloth
description:
Cloth woven from Wool.
Required to create armor.

name: Cloth Covered Container
description: Cloth covered container for storing items.

name: Cloth Outfit
description:
Clothes made from cloth.
Protects against the cold of night.

name: Cloth Outfit Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Cloth Outfit Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Cloth Outfit Schematic 3
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Cloth Outfit Schematic 3 (Epic).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Coal
description:
Coal often found in caves and other places.
Required to create high quality metal.

name: Coal Mine
description: Facility for producing large quantities of Coal.

name: Coarse Ammo
description:
Ammo for Musket, Makeshift Handgun and other similar weapons.
Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.

name: Cola Vending Machine
description:
Decorative cola vending machine.
Cannot be used to buy items.

name: Cold Resistant Metal Armor
description:
Improved Metal Armor.
Useful for activities in cold regions.

name: Cold Resistant Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Cold Resistant Metal Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Cold Resistant Pal Metal Armor
description:
Improved Pal Metal Armor.
Useful for activities in cold regions.

name: Cold Resistant Pelt Armor
description:
Pelt Armor produced in cold climates.
Protects against freezing temperatures.
Requires High Quality Workbench to craft.

name: Cold Resistant Pelt Armor Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Cold Resistant Pelt Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Cold Resistant Refined Metal Armor
description:
Improved Refined Metal Armor.
Useful for surviving in cold climates.

name: Cold Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Cold Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

name: Common Shield
description:
A curious shield that was made using Paldium technology.
It repairs itself automatically when not taking damage after some time.

name: Cooking Pot
description: Can efficiently prepare more varieties of food.

name: Cooler
description: Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat. A Pal with the Cooling Work Suitability is needed to maintain the cooling effect.

name: Cooler Box
description: Used to store items. A Pal with the Cooling Work Suitability is needed to maintain the cooling effect.

name: Copper Key
description: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

name: Cotton Candy
description:
Cotton Candy collected from Woolipop.
Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

name: Crossbow Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Crossbow (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Crossbow Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Crossbow (Rare).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Crossbow Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Crossbow (Epic).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Crossbow Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Crossbow (Legendary).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Crude Oil
description:
A material that can be processed into various products.
Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.

name: Curve Module
description:
Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory.
It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power.

name: Daedream's Necklace
description:
Collar for Daedream.
If Daedream is in your team, it will stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

name: Dark Fragment
description: Dropped by some powerful Dark Pals at Feybreak. Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

name: Dark Kingferno Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Blazehowl Noct.

name: Dark Mutant's Power Converter
description: A saddle for safely riding Dark Mutant.

name: Dark Pyrin Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Dark Noct.

name: Dazemu Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Dazemu.

name: Dazzi Cloud
description:
Cloud dropped from a Dazzi.
Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

name: Dazzi's Necklace
description:
Collar for Dazzi.
If Dazzi is in your team, it will stay by your side and attack enemies in tandem.

name: Defense Pendant
description: An accessory that slightly raises Defense.

name: Defense Pendant +1
description: An accessory that raises Defense.

name: Defense Pendant +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Defense.

name: Defensive Wall
description: Large defensive wall that protects from enemy invasions.

name: Deluxe Bait
description:
Bait that lures in Pals.
Improved to slightly enlarge the size of the bar in the fishing minigame.

name: Diamond
description:
A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Digtoise's Headband
description:
Headband for Digtoise.
Activate its Partner Skill to make Digtoise spin at high speeds, allowing it to more efficiently smash through rock.

name: Dinossom Lux Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Dinossom Lux.

name: Dinossom Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Dinossom.

name: Direhowl's Saddled Harness
description: Saddle for safely riding Direhowl.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Dog Coin
description: A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these. A Mimog will usually have them, but for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

name: Double Street Lamp
description:
Double street lamp that provides illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

name: Double-Barreled Shotgun Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Double-Barreled Shotgun (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Double-Barreled Shotgun Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Double-Barreled Shotgun (Rare).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Double-Barreled Shotgun Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Double-Barreled Shotgun (Epic).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Double-Barreled Shotgun Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Double-Barreled Shotgun (Legendary).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Dragostrophe's Shotgun
description: A shotgun for Dragostrophe to hold.

name: Dumud Chowder
description:
Dumud lavishly covered in a thick,creamy soup.
Eat to increase work speed and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Earthen Pipe
description: Decorative earthen pipe.

name: Egg
description:
Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals.
Chikipi produce them.

name: Egg Incubator
description: Used for incubating a Pal Egg. If a Pal Egg is left in it, it will automatically hatch after some time has passed.

name: Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco
description:
Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg.
This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it.
Eat to increase Attack by +20% for a period of time.

name: Eikthyrdeer Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Eikthyrdeer.

name: Eikthyrdeer Stew
description:
A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love.
The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness.
Eat to increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

name: Eikthyrdeer Terra Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Eikthyrdeer Terra.

name: Eikthyrdeer Venison
description: Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

name: Electric Cooler
description:
Cools the nearby area and protects against the heat.
Improved range and cooling capabilities.

name: Electric Egg Incubator
description: Device for incubating Pal eggs. Requires electricity, but automatically keeps the inside of the incubator at appropriate temperatures.

name: Electric Furnace
description:
Allows refinement of Pal Metal Ingot.
It requires Electricity to use, but is quicker to process.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

name: Electric Heater
description:
Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold.
Improved range and heating capabilities.

name: Electric Kitchen
description:
Needed for cooking food.
It requires electricity to run, but allows a large amount of meals to be prepared rapidly.
Requires a Pal with Kindling to light a flame.

name: Electric Medicine Workbench
description:
A facility for making Pal medicine.
It requires electricity, but can produce high quality medicine.
Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

name: Electric Mine
description:
Electrocutes those who step on it.
Electrocuted Pals are easier to capture.

name: Electric Organ
description:
Material obtainable from Electric Pals.
It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

name: Electric Pylon
description:
Place in a base to improve electricity generating speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Elphidran Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Elphidran.

name: Emerald
description:
A gemstone that glows green.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Emergency Exit Sign Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Apparently a priceless artifact in more civilized times.

name: Energy Cartridge
description: Ammo used by the Laser Rifle and similar weapons.

name: Exotic Sphere
description:
A sphere that captures Pals when thrown.
Boasting incredible performance, it can capture Pals that fall outside regular standards.

name: Exploration Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Explorer Cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Explorer Cap
description:
A cap for explorers.
It protects from the bright rays of the sun.

name: Faleris Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Faleris.

name: Farming Hat
description:
A hat for working in the fields.
It protects from the bright rays of the sun.

name: Farming Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Farming Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Feathered Hair Band
description:
Beautiful feathered headband.
Somehow protects its wearer from lethal head injuries.
Requires Primitive Workbench to craft.

name: Feathered Hair Band Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Feathered Hair Band (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Feed Box
description:
Place food, and Pals at the base
will eat from it.

name: Fenglope Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Fenglope.

name: Fiber
description:
Fiber collected from trees.
A material used for creating bows, etc.

name: Fine Bed
description:
Soft bed with improved restorative capabilities.
Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

name: Fire Arrow
description:
Used with Fire Bow.
Requires Primitive Workbench to craft.

name: Fireplace Set
description:
Brick fireplace set to provide illumination.
Must be lit with fire.

name: Flame Cauldron
description:
Place in base to improve fire-making speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Flame Organ
description:
Material obtainable from Fire Pals.
Can be used to make Fire Arrow and more.

name: Flamethrower Fuel
description: Flamethrower fuel. Ammo for the Flamethrower and similar weapons.

name: Flea Market (Items)
description: Put up items for sale on multiplayer servers.

name: Flea Market (Pals)
description: Put up Pals for sale on multiplayer servers.

name: Flopie's Necklace
description:
Collar for Flopie.
If Flopie is in your team, it will stay by your side and automatically gather nearby items.

name: Flour
description:
Flour made from grinding Wheat.
It can be used to craft various foods.

name: Flower Bed
description:
Place in base to improve gathering speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Fluffy Pal Bed
description: Pals sleep more soundly, improving the amount of Health and SAN recovered while sleeping.

name: Foxparks Cryst's Harness
description:
Harness for holding Foxparks Cryst.
Activate its Partner Skill to hold Foxparks Cryst and release freezing air to attack.

name: Foxparks's Harness
description:
Harness for holding Foxparks.
Activate its Partner Skill to hold Foxparks and attack using it as a flamethrower.

name: Fried Chikipi
description:
Magnificently juicy poultry.
Eat to increase work speed and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

name: Fried Egg
description:
An Egg now fried and even more delicious.
Great for keeping hunger away.

name: Fried Kelpsea
description:
Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness.
Eat to increase Defense by +10% and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

name: Frostallion Noct Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Frostallion Noct

name: Frostallion Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Frostallion.

name: Future Technical Manual
description:
A book that contains secrets of technology beyond current day comprehension.
Use it to obtain lots of Technology Points.

name: Futuristic Structure Set
description:
Set for building a base using futuristic architecture.
Allows building of futuristic foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

name: Galeclaw Poultry
description: Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

name: Galeclaw's Gloves
description:
Gloves for gently holding on to Galeclaw's legs.
If Galeclaw is in your team, it can be used as a glider.

name: Garbage Bag
description: Decorative garbage bag.

name: Giant Feed Bag
description:
An extraordinarily large sack for storing food.
Unlocks 5 slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

name: Giant Pal Soul
description:
The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a .

name: Giga Glider
description:
Glider for soaring through the air.
Very fast with improved capabilities.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line.

name: Giga Shield
description:
A curious shield that was made using Paldium technology.
It repairs itself automatically when not taking damage after some time.
Modifications have increased its effectiveness even further.

name: Giga Sphere
description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

name: Glass Structure Set
description:
Set for building a base using glass.
Allows building of glass foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

name: Global Palbox
description: Facility for storing Pal genetic data.

name: Gold Coin
description: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

name: Gold Coin Assembly Line
description:
An Assembly Line that manufactures Money
The work puts a strain on the mind, causing a decrease in Pal's SAN value.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Gold Key
description: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

name: Golden Crown
description:
A rare golden crown.
Just wearing it makes you feel like royalty.

name: Golden Crown Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Golden Crown (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Graduate Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Graduation cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Graduation Cap
description:
A cap that makes its wearer feel smarter.
Was there once a school on this island?

name: Grilled Chikipi
description:
Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

name: Grilled Galeclaw
description: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

name: Grilled Kelpsea
description:
Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire.
Plump and juicy.

name: Grilled Lamball
description:
Marinated mutton slow cooked over a grill.
Eat to slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Grinning Tocotoco Cap
description:
Cap shaped like a Tocotoco.
It makes those who wear it smile uncontrollably.

name: Grinning Tocotoco Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Grinning Tocotoco Cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Grintale Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Grintale.

name: Grizzbolt's Minigun
description: Makes Grizzbolt fire a minigun when ridden.
source: Crafting at the Pal Gear Workbench

name: Gumoss Cap
description: Cap shaped like a Gumoss.

name: Gumoss Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Gumoss Cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Gumoss Leaf
description:
Leaves dropped from a Gumoss.
Used to make clothing.

name: Gunpowder
description:
Gunpowder used to fire ammunition.
Required to make bullets.

name: Handgun Ammo
description: Bullets used in items like Handgun.

name: Handgun Schematic 1

Gloves for gently holding on to Hangyu Cryst's arms.

name: Hangyu's Gloves
description:
Gloves for gently holding on to Hangyu's arms.
If Hangyu is in your team, it can be used as a glider.

description:
Improved Metal Armor.
Boats high heat resistance.

description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Metal Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

Improved Pal Metal Armor.
Proudly boasts a high heat resistance.

name: Heat Resistant Pelt Armor
description:
A Pelt Armor produced in hot regions.
Can withstand some heat.

name: Heat Resistant Pelt Armor Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Pelt Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor
description:
Improved Refined Metal Armor.
Boasts a high heat resistance.

name: Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

name: Heat Resistant Undershirt
description: An accessory that slightly raises Heat Resistance.

name: Heat Resistant Undershirt +1
description: An accessory that raises Heat Resistance.

name: Heat Resistant Undershirt +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Heat Resistance.

name: Heater
description: Warms the nearby area and protects against the cold.

name: Heavy Weight Module
description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

name: Helmet
description:
A tough helmet that protects its wearer's head.
It was apparently made after a number of people injured their heads
after taking a tumble off a Eikthyrdeer.

name: Helmet Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Helmet (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Helzephyr Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Helzephyr.

name: Herb Roasted Caprity
description: Mild roast filled with natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

name: Herb Roasted Lamball
description:
Indulges in an abundance of fresh berries to create a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton.
Eat to increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

name: Hexolite Quartz
description:
A rare crystal found only in Feybreak.
Over many years, Paldium Fragment has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

name: Hexolite Quartz Mine
description:
Facility for producing Hexolite Quartz.
 Digging Hexolite Quartzs is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

name: High Grade Medical Supplies
description:
High Grade Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Weakened and Depressed.
They do not heal health.

name: High Grade Technical Manual
description:
A book that contains secrets of amazing technology.
Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

name: High Quality Bait
description:
Bait that lures in Pals.
Improved to make them bite more readily.

name: High Quality Cloth
description:
High Quality Cloth woven from a large number of Wool.
Required to create high quality armor.

name: High Quality Hot Spring
description:
Facility where Pals on base can rest.
Now comfier and restores more SAN.

name: High Quality Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
High quality; restores a lot of Health.

description:
A High Quality Workbench for producing items and gear.
A small workspace limits production speeds.
Requires a Pal that can work with their hands.

name: Hip Lantern
description:
A lantern that can be attached to the hip.
It lights up automatically at night.
Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

name: Homeward Thundercloud
description: Transports you to the nearest base. Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

name: Homing Module
description: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power.

name: Honey
description:
Honey harvested from Beegarde.
It's sweet and tasty.

name: Horizontal Wall Ivy
description:
Decorative horizontal ivy.
Can be placed on a wall.

name: Horn
description:
Horn collected from Pals.
Used to created medicine and more.

name: Hot Milk
description:
Even more delicious when warmed up.
Great for keeping hunger away.

name: Hot Spring
description:
Facility where Pals on base can rest.
Restores SAN after a long day of hard work.

description: Decorative houseplant.

Decorative furniture set.
Place plants around your base for a splash of color.

description: Decorative houseplant and chair.

An extremely large pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

description:
A facility that converts rotational motion into electrical energy. 
 The efficiency is low, and the Pals working here will experience a decrease in SAN value, but they will gain experience points.

name: Hyper Glider
description:
Glider for soaring through the air.
Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.
Can be made at Production Assembly Line II.

name: Hyper Shield
description:
A curious shield that was made using Paldium technology.
It repairs itself automatically when not taking damage after some time.
Repeated testing has created a near perfect product.

name: Hyper Sphere
description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture very powerful Pals.

name: Ice Kingpaca Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Kingpaca Cryst.

name: Ice Mine
description:
Freezes those who step on it.
Frozen Pals are easier to capture.

name: Ice Organ
description: Material obtainable from Ice Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

description:
Allows refinement of Refined Ingot.
The quality has improved, but the processing speed is still unsatisfactory.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

name: Ingot
description: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

name: Innovative Technical Manual
description:
A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology.
Use it to obtain Technology Points.

name: Iron Chair
description: Decorative wooden chair.

name: Iron Desk
description: Decorative iron desk.

name: Iron Gate
description: Metal gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

Iron Wall Shelf for storing items.

name: Ironwood Table
description: Decorative ironwood table.

Decorative furniture set.
Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

Bread with jam spread on it.
The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

Set for building a base using Japanese-style architecture.
Allows building of Japanese-style foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

source: Crafting at the Pal Gear Workbench

source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Jolthog's Gloves
description: Rubber gloves for handling Jolthog. Activate its Partner Skill, and Jolthog will throw electric grenades.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Jormuntide Ignis Saddle

name: Jormuntide Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Jormuntide.

description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Katress Cap (Uncommon).

Hair dropped from a Katress.
Used to make clothing.

name: Killamari Tentacle
description:
Tentacles dropped from a Killamari.
Used to make potions.

description: Gloves for gently holding on to Killamari's legs. If Killamari is in your team, it can be used as a glider.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Kingpaca Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Kingpaca.

description: Saddle for safely riding Kitsun.

Deeply complex with unique flavors.

Lamball meat.
Red meat with a unique flavor.
Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

A large pouch for holding food.
Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory.
Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry.

Device for incubating Pal eggs.
It automatically maintains suitable temperature and can hatch multiple eggs at once.

name: Large Mounted Lamp
description: Lights up large areas at a base.

Fluffy bed to give Pals a good rest.
Pans can rest when injured or sleep at night.
Even large Pals can sleep soundly on a bed like this.

description:
A spirit left behind by a Pal.
It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

description:
Place in base to improve handiwork speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Laser Rifle Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Laser Rifle (Uncommon). 
Can be crafted in Weapon Assembly Line II.

name: Leather

description:
Decorative furniture set.
Leather screams luxury.

name: Leezpunk Crest
description:
Crest dropped from a Leezpunk.
Used to make potions.

description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. It has extremely powerful capturing capabilities, leaving almost no Pal able to escape.

A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must.
It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

A farm that can grow Lettuce.
It requires a great amount of time to harvest.

name: Lettuce Seeds

description:
Small green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.

A mysterious Pal statue that can be found all around Palpagos Island.
Players can enhance their abilities by making offerings to certain statues.

name: Lockpicking Tool v1

name: Lockpicking Tool v2
description: No key? No problem!

name: Lockpicking Tool v3
description: No key? No problem!

description: Uses Pals with the Lumbering ability to cut down trees and generate wood

It doesn't provide much head protection.

description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Long-eared Headband (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Low Grade Medical Supplies good for colds and sprains.
They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Low quality, but restores some Health.

Mammorest meat.
With massive size comes massive flavor.
Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

description:
Boasts a rich and dignified flavor.
Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

description: Saddle for safely riding Maraith.

Strange Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Ulcer and Fracture.
they don't heal Health.

description: A shelf for storing medicine. Sick Pals will come here to take their medicine. Be sure to keep the medicine stocked.

description:
A facility for making Pal medicine.
It can only produce simple medicines.
Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

name: Medium Pal Soul
description: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

name: Mega Glider
description:
A glider for soaring through the air.
A mass produced commercial model, it's decently fast.

description:
A curious shield that was made using Paldium technology.
It repairs itself automatically when not taking damage after some time.
As a mass produced model, defenses have been enhanced.

name: Mega Sphere
description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

name: Melpaca Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Melpaca.

description:
A potion that allows the player to reset status points when consumed.
It has no effect if consumed by Pal.

name: Metal Armor
description:
Armor made of metal.
Somewhat heavy, but provides good defense.
Requires High Quality Workbench to craft.

name: Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Metal Armor (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Metal Armor Schematic 2
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Metal Armor (Rare).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Metal Barrel Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Not suitable for doing keg stands.

name: Metal Chair and Desk Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

name: Metal Chest
description:
Stores items.
Reinforced with metal, it is somewhat durable.
The increased size allows for the storage of more things.

description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

A helm made of metal.
A reliable piece of armor that protects your head and all the thoughts within.
Requires High Quality Workbench to craft.

name: Metal Helm Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Metal Helm (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Metal Shelf Set
description:
Metal shelf set.
Can store items.

name: Metal Structure Set
description:
Set for building a base using metal.
Allows building of metal foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for building a house.

name: Might Remedy
description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Attack by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Milk
description:
Drink it as is, or use it in various meals.
Can be milked from Mozzarina.

name: Mill
description:
Facility for milling Wheat to produce Flour.
Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

name: Mind Control Meds
description:
Mind Control Meds that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents.
they do not heal Health.

name: Mine
description: Automatically detonates when stepped on.

name: Missile Ammo
description: Ammo for the Guided Missile Launcher and similar weapons.

name: Monarch's Crown
description:
A crown for those who possess a high ranking.
Being quite heavy, it's not suited for practical use.

name: Monarch's Crown Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Monarch's Crown (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Monitoring Stand
description:
You can command your Pals to work on various things inside a base.
Try not to overwork them!

name: Mossanda Lux's Grenade Launcher
description: Makes Mossanda Lux fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

name: Mossanda's Grenade Launcher
description: Makes Mossanda fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

description: Assign a Pal with Handiwork suitability and it will protect a base using the crossbow.

name: Mounted Machine Gun
description:
Deploy a Pal to operate this defensive installation.
Requires Rifle Ammo to use.
Place ammo in the chest, and the deployed Pal will automatically load the weapon.

name: Mounted Torch
description: Place it at a base to light the surrounding area.

description:
Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine.
Eat to increase Attack by +20% and stay full longer for a period of time.

name: Mozzarina Hamburger
description:
The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweatness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece.
Eat to increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Mozzarina Meat
description:
Mozzarina meat.
Thick, juicy and marbled.
Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

name: Mozzarina Steak
description:
Thick, well-done steak.
Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

name: Multiclimate Undershirt
description: An accessory that slightly raises Heat and Cold Resistance.

name: Multiclimate Undershirt +1
description: An accessory that raises Heat and Cold Resistance.
source: Raid Boss, bought from Medal Merchant for 100 Dog Coins

name: Multiclimate Undershirt +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Heat and Cold Resistance.

name: Mushroom
description:
A mushroom that can be eaten raw.
they can be found in the Red and Yellow Forestbiomes.

name: Mushroom Soup
description:
Cream soup made of Mushrooms.
Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Musket Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Musket (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at a Workbench.

name: Musket Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Musket (Rare).
Can be crafted at a Weapons Workbench.

name: Musket Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Musket (Epic).
Can be crafted at a Workbench.

name: Musket Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Musket (LEgendary).
Can be crafted at a Workbench

Mushroom juice known for its incredibly uplifting effect.
Drinking it greatly boosts work speed for a period of time, but drastically decreases SAN value.

name: Nail
description:
Necessary for building various facilities.
Can be made with a Primitive Workbench.

name: Necromus Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Necromus.

Sand that can be found in the desert at night.
Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

name: Nitewing Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Nitewing.

name: Normal Parachute
description:
Glider for soaring through the air.
Simply made, it isn't very fast.

name: Old Bow Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Old Bow (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Old Bow Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Old Bow (Rare).
Can be crafted at a Workbench.

name: Old Bow Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Old Bow (Epic).
Can be crafted at a Workbench.

name: Old Bow Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Old Bow (Legendary).
Can be crafted at a Workbench.

name: Old TV
description:
Decorative old TV.
Left behind by an ancient civilization, now it only shows images of Pengullet.

name: Omelet
description:
A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup.
Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.

name: Ore
description:
Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace.
Can be found in caves and other places.
There are rumors of Pals capable of detecting ore.

name: Ore Mining Site
description: Facility for producing Ore. Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

name: Ore Mining Site II
description:
Facility for producing large quantities of Ore.
 Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance.
 Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

name: Outdoor Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Spruces up the outside of your base.

name: Pal Dressing Facility
description:
Skin Modification Facility. A facility where you can change Pal's appearance to a special one. 
 It allows the application of skins obtained outside of the game.

name: Pal Essence Condenser
description:
A chamber for increasing a Pal's rank.
Pals can surpass their physical limitations if given a concentrated extract taken from a Pal of the same type.

name: Pal Fluids
description:
Body fluids taken from a Pal.
Useful for its high viscosity.

name: Pal Gear Workbench
description:
A Primitive Workbench for producing Pal tools.
Make a saddle to ride Pals, or make a gun for Pals to use.

name: Pal Metal Armor
description:
Armor fully utilizing the latest technology.
Boasts overwhelming defense.
Requires Production Assembly Line II to craft.

name: Pal Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pal Metal Armor (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

name: Cloth Outfit
description:
Helmet fully utilizing the latest technology.
Ensures a good view and boasts the very best defense.
Requires Production Assembly Line II to craft.

name: Pal Metal Ingot
description:
Material required to create weapons and armor using Pal Metal.
Made stronger by creating an alloy from metal and Paldium.

name: Pal Reverser
description:
A mysterious medicine that can change a Pal's gender.
Can be used at the

name: Pal Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
 Mass produced, it is only effective on low level Pals.

name: Pal Surgery Table
description: A facility where surgery can be performed on Pals to change their genders or passive skills.

name: Paladius Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Paladius.

Facility for storing captured Pals.
Pals inside gradually recover HP.
The area around this structure will become your base.

name: Paldium Fragment
description:
Crystallized energy from the World Tree.
Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

name: Pancake

name: Pelt Armor
description:
Armor made of Leather.
Its warmth and defense have been improved.

name: Pelt Armor Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Pelt Armor Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (Epic).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Pelt Armor Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (Legendary).
Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

name: Pendant of Diligence
description: An accessory that slightly raises Work Speed.

name: Pendant of Diligence +1
description: An accessory that raises Work Speed.

name: Pendant of Diligence +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Work Speed.

name: Pengullet's Rocket Launcher
description:
Rocket launcher for launching Pengullet.
Activate its Partner Skill to fire Pengullet and damage enemies. After firing, Pengullet will become incapacitated.

name: Penking Cap
description: Cap shaped like a Penking.

name: Penking Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Penking Cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Penking Plume
description:
Plume dropped from a Penking.
Used to make clothing.

name: Piano Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place in your base and dream about living a life of luxury.

name: Pickaxe and Helmet
description:
Place in base to improve mining speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Pizza

A dish made by piling Red Berries, Tomato and cheese on Bread.
Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Plasteel created by processing Crude oil and metal
Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

Made from refined oil.

name: Potato Seeds
description: Seeds that produce Potato.

description: Decorative potted houseplant.

Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain.

description:
A Lightning Pal-powered electric generator.
Electric equipment won't run without this.

name: Power Lotus (L)
description:
Large red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Might Elixir.

name: power Lotus (S)
description:
Small red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Might Remedy.

name: Precious Claw

name: Precious Dragon Stone

name: Precious Entrails

name: Precious Pelt
description:
Fluffy fur collected from pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Precious Plume
description:
Glittering feathers collected from Pals.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Predator Core
description:
Core dropped by Predator Pals.
It is filled with mysterious energy.

name: Primitive Furnace
description:
Allows refinement of Ingot.
The quality leaves much to desire, and processing is slow.
Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

name: Primitive Workbench
description:
A Primitive Workbench for producing simple items.
Requires a Pal that can work with their hands.

name: Production Assembly Line
description:
A High Quality Workbench for producing items and gear.
By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Production Assembly Line II
description:
A High Quality Workbench for producing items and gear.
Through clever management, production speeds have increased greatly.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Pump-Action Shotgun Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pump-action Shotgun (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Pump-Action Shotgun Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pump-action Shotgun (Rare).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Pump-Action Shotgun Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pump-action Shotgun (Epic).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Pump-Action Shotgun Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Pump-action Shotgun (Legendary).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Pure Quartz
description:
Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places.
Required to create Circuit Board.

name: Pyrin Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Pyrin.

name: Quivern Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Quivern.

name: Radar Sphere
description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Though it has a low chance of success, it can forcibly capture another person’s Pal.

name: Ragnahawk Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Ragnahawk.

name: Ranch
description:
Farm for raising sheep-and fowl-like Pals.
Assign a Pal with the appropriate traits to a farm to automatically produce them.

name: Raw Dumud
description:
Dumud meat.
Fatty with a rich taste.
Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

name: Raw Kelpsea
description:
Kelpsea meat.
Tender and slightly sweet.
Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

name: Rayhound Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Rayhound.

name: Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Restores a decent amount of Health.

name: Red Berries
description:
A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked
They can be found anywhere on the island.

name: Refined Ingot
description: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using an Improved Furnace.

name: Refined Metal Armor
description:
Armor made from high quality metal.
Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense.
Requires Production Assembly Line to craft.

name: Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Refined Metal Armor (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

name: Refined Metal Chest
description:
Stores items.
Made of iron, it is extremely durable.
It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

name: Refined Metal Helm
description:
Helm made from high quality metal.
Its sheen gives the wearer a greater sense of confidence.
Requires Production Assembly Line to craft.

name: Refined Metal Helm Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Refined Metal Helm (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

name: Refrigerator
description: Used to store items. A Pal with the Cooling Work Suitability is needed to maintain the cooling effect.

name: Reindrix Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Reindrix.

name: Reindrix Stew
description:
Stewed vegetables and venison reared in a frigid environment.
The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness.
Eat to stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Reindrix Venison
description:
Reindrix meat.
Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures.
Takes a very long time to spoil.

name: Relaxaurus Lux's Missile Launcher
description: Makes Relaxaurus Lux fire a missile launcher when ridden.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Relaxaurus's Missile Launcher
description: Makes Relaxaurus fire a missile launcher when ridden.

name: Repair Bench
description: Repairs damaged weapons and tools.

name: Repair Kit
description:
Tools for repairing structures.
Use it on destroyed structures to repair them.

name: Reptyro Cryst Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Reptyro Cryst.

name: Reptyro Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Reptyro.

name: Retro Street Lamp
description:
Retro street lamp that provides illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

name: Revival Potion
description: A potion that revives a Pal that has been injured and is unable to move.

name: Ribbuny Headband
description: Headband shaped like a Ribbuny.

name: Ribbuny Headband Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Ribbuny Headband (Common).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Ribbuny Ribbon
description:
Ribbon dropped from a Ribbuny.
Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

name: Rifle Ammo
description: Ammo used with Single-shot Rifle and other similar weapons.

name: Ring of Dark Resistance
description: An accessory that slightly lowers Dark damage.

description: An accessory that lowers Dark damage.

name: Ring of Dark Resistance +2
description: An accessory that greatly lowers Dark damage.

description: An accessory that slightly lowers Dragon damage.

description: An accessory that lowers Dragon damage.

description: An accessory that greatly lowers Dragon damage.

description: An accessory that lowers Fire damage.

description: An accessory that greatly lowers Grass damage.

description: An accessory that lowers Ice damage.

description: An accessory that lowers Electric damage.

name: Ring of Lightning Resistance +2
description: An accessory that greatly lowers Electric damage.

name: Ring of Mercy
description: Pacifist's ring. The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

name: Ring of Resistance
description: An accessory that slightly lowers Neutral damage.

name: Ring of Resistance +1
description: An accessory that lowers Neutral damage.

name: Ring of Resistance +2
description: An accessory that greatly lowers Neutral damage.

name: Ring of Water Resistance
description: An accessory that slightly lowers Water damage.

name: Ring of Water Resistance +1
description: An accessory that lowers Water damage.

name: Ring of Water Resistance +2
description: An accessory that greatly lowers Water damage.

name: Road Sign Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
No roads mean no traffic control.

name: Roast Eikthyrdeer
description:
Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes accented
by the aromas of the deep forest.
Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

name: Roast Reindrix
description:
When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature.
This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

name: Roast Rushoar
description:
Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

name: Rocket Ammo
description:
Ammo for Rocket Launcher and other similar weapons.
Requires Weapon Assembly Line II to craft.

name: Rocket Launcher Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Rocket Launcher (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Rocket Launcher Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Rocket Launcher (Rare).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Rocket Launcher Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Rocket Launcher (Epic).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Rocket Launcher Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Rocket Launcher (Legendary).
Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

name: Round Iron Table
description: Decorative round iron table.

name: Ruby
description: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs
description:
The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eat to increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

name: Rushoar Hot Dog
description:
Thick sausage wedged between warm buns.
The crispy seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for.
Eat to increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

name: Rushoar Pork
description:
Rushoar meat.
Full of the delicious flavors of wild game.
Juicy and nutritious.

name: Rushoar Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Rushoar.

name: Salad
description: A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato. Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

name: Sandbag
description: Pals assigned to it will watch for approaching enemies.

name: Sapphire
description:
A gemstone that glows blue.
Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

name: Shadowbeak Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Shadowbeak.

name: Shoddy Bed
description:
Human bed. Sleeping restores HP.
Sleep at night and time will pass until morning. Cannot sleep unless built under a roof.

name: Shotgun Shells
description:
Ammo for shotguns and other similar weapons.
Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.

name: Sign
description: Can be written on.

name: Silk Hat
description:
A gentleman's cap.
Those made from Sibelyx materials are considered luxury items,
but those made from Swee materials are of poor quality, and more commonly found.

name: Silk Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Silk Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Silo
description:
Place in base to improve planting speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Silver Key
description: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

name: Simple Street Lamp
description:
Simple street lamp that provides illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

name: Single Shot Rifle Schematic 1
description:
Unlocks recipe for Single Shot Rifle (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Single Shot Rifle Schematic 2
description:
Unlocks recipe for Single Shot Rifle (Rare).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Single Shot Rifle Schematic 3
description:
Unlocks recipe for Single Shot Rifle (Epic).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Single Shot Rifle Schematic 4
description:
Unlocks recipe for Single Shot Rifle (Legendary).
Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

name: Slider Module
description:
Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere.
The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power.

name: Small Container
description: Small container for storing items.

name: Small Feed Bag
description: Unlocks a food slot in your inventory. Players and pals automatically consume food when hungry.

name: Small Pal Soul
description: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

name: Small Pouch
description: A small pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots.

name: Small Wall Ivy
description:
Decorative small ivy.
Can be placed on a wall.

name: Sniper Module
description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

name: Sniper Module II
description: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

name: Snowman
description:
Place in base to improve cooling speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Soccer Goal
description:
Decorative soccer goal.
Kicking a Lamball into it will get you no points.

name: Soft Hat
description:
A light and flexible cap perfect for everyday use.
Fashionable, it was once a popular item on the island.

name: Soft Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Soft Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Speed Elixir
description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Work Speed when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Speed Lotus (L)
description:
Large orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Speed Elixir.

name: Speed Lotus (S)
description:
Small orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Speed Remedy.

name: Speed Remedy
description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises work speed by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Sphere Assembly Line
description:
An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals.
By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Sphere Assembly Line II
description:
An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals.
Through clever management, production speeds have greatly increased.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Sphere Workbench
description:
An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals.
A small workspace keeps the production speed slow.
Requires a Pal that can work with their hands.

name: Stamina Elixir
description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises stamina when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Stamina Lotus (L)
description:
Large yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Stamina Elixir.

name: Stamina Lotus (S)
description:
Small yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Needed to make Stamina Remedy.

name: Stamina Remedy
description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises stamina by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Statue of Power
description: Make offerings to enhance the stats of the Player and their Pals.

name: Stewed Galeclaw
description:
Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors.
Eat to make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Stone
description:
Materials for structures and items.
Can be obtained by mining rocks.

name: Stone Gate
description: Stone gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

name: Stone Pit
description: Uses Pals with the Mining ability to mine down rock and generate Stone

name: Stone Structure Set
description:
Set for building a base using stone.
Allows building of stone foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for building a house.

name: Storage Container Set
description:
Container furniture set.
Can store items.

name: Stout Fruit
description:
Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain.
Slightly increases a Pal's defense.

name: Strange Juice
description: Juice that gretaly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increase work speed, but significantly lowers SAN.

name: Straw Pal Bed
description:
Pals at base recover SAN when sleeping in beds at night.
Without a bed, Pals cannot sleep soundly, and no SAN is recovered.

name: Street Lamp Set
description:
Street lamp set to provide illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

name: Stump and Axe
description:
Place in base to improve logging speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Stylish Street Lamp
description:
Stylish street lamp that provides illumination.
Requires electricity to light.

name: Sulfur
description:
Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such.
Necessary for making Gunpowder.

name: Sulfur Mine
description: Facility for producing large quantities of Sulfur.

name: Summoning Altar
description: Offer a Slab depicting a Pal to summon a powerful Pal to your base. Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

name: Surfent Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Surfent.

name: Surfent Terra Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Surfent Terra.

name: Suspicious Juice
description: Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it greatly increase work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.

name: Suzaku Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Suzaku.

name: Swee Hair
description:
Hair dropped from a Swee.
Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

name: Sweepa Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Sweepa.

name: Tabletop Houseplant
description: Decorative tabletop houseplant.

name: Tanzee's Assault Rifle
description:
Assault rifle made especially for Tanzee.
Activate its Partner Skill, and Tanzee will enter gunner mode and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

name: Thermal Undershirt
description: An accessory that slightly raises Cold Resistance.

name: Thermal Undershirt +1
description: An accessory that raises Cold Resistance.

name: Thermal Undershirt +2
description: An accessory that greatly raises Cold Resistance.

name: Tire
description: Decorative tire.

name: Tocotoco Cap
description:
Cap shaped like a Tocotoco.
Its gaudy design is visible from far away.

name: Tocotoco Cap Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tocotoco Cap (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Tocotoco Feather
description:
Feathers dropped from a Tocotoco.
Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

name: Tocotoco's Gloves
description: Gloves for gently holding Tocotoco. Activate its Partner Skill to hold Tocotoco and use it to fire explosive eggs.
source: Crafting at a Pal Gear Workbench

name: Tomato
description:
A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish.
Filled with lycopene, they're also very healthy.

name: Tomato Plantation
description:
Farm for producing tomatoes.
Requires Pal with Planting, Watering, and Gathering suitabilities.

name: Tomato Seeds
description: Seeds that produce Tomato.

name: Tombstone
description:
A tombstone that can be inscribed with text.
Use it for recording purposes.

name: Traffic Control Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
No roads mean no traffic control.

name: Training Crystal
description: Strange crystal that when given to a Pal raises its level by one.

name: Training Dummy
description: Training dummy shaped like a Pengullet.

name: Training Manual (L)
description: Training manual that grants a large amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

name: Training Manual (M)
description: Training manual that grants a small amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

name: Training Manual (S)
description: Training manual that grants a tiny amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

name: Training Manual (XL)
description: Training manual that grants a substantial amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

name: Tricorne
description:
A cap for those who love to fight.
It's previous owner nearly drove Azurobe to extinction.

name: Tricorne Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tricorne (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Tropical Outfit
description:
A Cloth Outfit produced in hot regions.
Can withstand some heat.

name: Tropical Outfit Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tropical Outfit Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Tundra Outfit
description:
Cloth Outfit produced in cold climates.
Protects against freezing temperatures.
Requires Primitive Workbench to craft.

name: Tundra Outfit Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tundra Outfit Schematic 1 (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Ultimate Sphere
description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.

name: Ultra Shield
description:
A curious shield that was made using Paldium technology.
It repairs itself automatically when not taking damage after some time.
As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved.

name: Ultra Sphere
description:
A sphere that captures Pals when thrown.
With powerful abilities, not many Pals are able to escape it.

name: Univolt Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Univolt.

name: Vanwyrm Cryst Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Vanwyrm Cryst.

name: Vanwyrm Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Vanwyrm.

name: Venom Gland
description: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

name: Viewing Cage
description:
Container for observing captured Pals.
Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production, but they do not become hungry.

name: Vital Elixir
description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Health when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Vital Remedy
description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Health by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Wall Torch
description: Place it on a wall to light the surrounding area.

name: Wall-Mounted Sign
description:
A signboard to write on.
Can be hung on walls.

name: Wall-mounted Houseplant Set
description: Decorative furniture set. Place plants on your base's walls for a splash of color.

name: Water Broncherry Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Broncherry Aqua.

name: Water Elphidran Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Elphidran Aqua.

name: Water Fountain
description:
Place in base to improve watering speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Water Suzaku Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Suzaku Aqua.

name: Weapon Assembly Line
description:
Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at a faster pace.
Requires Pals with Handiwork trait.

name: Weapon Assembly Line II
description:
Needs electricity but produces weapons and ammunition at an even faster pace.
Requires Pals with Handiwork trait.

name: Weapon Workbench
description:
An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition.
A small workspace prevents the production of high quality weapons.
Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

name: Wheat
description:
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes.
Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

name: Wheat Plantation
description:
A farm that can grow Wheat.
It requires an average amount of time to harvest.
Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water and harvest crops.

name: Wheat Seeds
description: Seeds that produce Wheat.

name: Witch Cauldron
description:
Place in base to improve the medicine manufacturing speed.
Placing more than one has no additional effect.

name: Witch Hat
description:
A hat modeled after a Wixen or Katress.
It makes you feel like you can use Pal skills.

name: Witch Hat Schematic 1
description:
When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Witch Hat (Uncommon).
Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

name: Witch's Crown (Ultra)
description:
Imbued with the ominous power of Bellanoir Libero (Ultra).
Extremely difficult to obtain.

name: Wood
description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

name: Wooden Barrel
description: Wooden barrel for storing items.

name: Wooden Barrel Shelf
description: Wooden barrel shelf for storing items.

name: Wooden Box
description: Wooden box for storing items.

name: Wooden Chest
description: Used to store items. Place at a base and Pals with Transporting suitability will automatically carry items to it.

name: Wooden Defensive Wall
description:
Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions.
Made from wood, it breaks easily.

name: Wooden Gate
description: Wooden gate large enough for big Pals to pass through.

name: Wooden Living Room Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Place furniture in your living space and enjoy life with your Pals.

name: Wooden Shelf
description: Wooden shelf for storing items.

name: Wooden Structure Set
description:
Set for building a base using wood.
Allows building of wooden foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for building a house.

name: Wooden Tavern Cabinet Furniture Set
description: Set of wooden cabinets that look at home in a tavern. Can store items.

name: Wooden Tavern Furniture Set
description:
Decorative furniture set.
Set up a bar and enjoy life with your Pals.

name: Wooden Decorative Wall Shelf
description:
Wooden shelf for storing items.
Can be placed on a wall.

name: Wool
description:
Material sheared from sheep Pals.
A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.

name: Wumpo Botan Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Wumpo Botan.

name: Wumpo Saddle
description: Saddle for safely riding Wumpo.
